name: codex-guidance
description: Path-scoped Markdown guidance for Codex sessions.
author: ExplodingKonjac

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('scripts', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.test-dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test .test-dist/src/*.test.js .test-dist/src/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.test-dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=".test-dist/src/**/*.js" --test-coverage-exclude=".test-dist/src/**/*.test.js" --test-coverage-exclude=".test-dist/src/test_support.js" --test .test-dist/src/*.test.js .test-dist/src/**/*.test.js
